creator: fjoe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: fjoe->portmgr

I reflected renames for asterisk 1.4 ports in ports/net/Makefile so you can 
safely remove ports/net/asterisk (that contained asterisk 1.4 port before it 
was repocopied to ports/net/asterisk14) before doing the remaining requested 
repocopy 

ports/net/asterisk16 -> ports/net/asterisk. 

Can you proceed with this now?
